mapper.sql: SELECT indicator_id, indicator_code, indicator_name, category_level1, category_level2, data_type, sort_order, source_tables, is_weighted, is_active, create_time, update_time FROM jw_indicator_config
mapper.select: WHERE is_weighted = '1' AND is_active = '1' ORDER BY sort_order
WHERE FIND_IN_SET(#{sourceTable}, source_tables) ORDER BY sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO jw_indicator_config ( indicator_code, indicator_name, category_level1, category_level2, data_type, sort_order, source_tables, is_weighted, is_active, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{indicatorCode}, #{indicatorName}, #{categoryLevel1}, #{categoryLevel2}, #{dataType}, #{sortOrder}, #{sourceTables}, #{isWeighted}, #{isActive}, sysdate(), sysdate() )

INSERT INTO jw_indicator_config ( indicator_code, indicator_name, category_level1, category_level2, data_type, sort_order, source_tables, is_weighted, is_active, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{indicatorCode}, #{indicatorName}, #{categoryLevel1}, #{categoryLevel2}, #{dataType}, #{sortOrder}, #{sourceTables}, #{isWeighted}, #{isActive}, sysdate(), sysdate() )
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM jw_indicator_config WHERE indicator_id IN
#{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO jw_indicator_config ( indicator_code, indicator_name, category_level1, category_level2, data_type, sort_order, source_tables, is_weighted, is_active, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
(#{item.indicatorCode}, #{item.indicatorName}, #{item.categoryLevel1}, #{item.categoryLevel2}, #{item.dataType}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.sourceTables}, #{item.isWeighted}, #{item.isActive}, sysdate(), sysdate())

INSERT INTO jw_indicator_config ( indicator_code, indicator_name, category_level1, category_level2, data_type, sort_order, source_tables, is_weighted, is_active, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{indicatorCode}, #{indicatorName}, #{categoryLevel1}, #{categoryLevel2}, #{dataType}, #{sortOrder}, #{sourceTables}, #{isWeighted}, #{isActive}, sysdate(), sysdate() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE indicator_name = VALUES(indicator_name), category_level1 = VALUES(category_level1), category_level2 = VALUES(category_level2), data_type = VALUES(data_type), sort_order = VALUES(sort_order), source_tables = VALUES(source_tables), is_weighted = VALUES(is_weighted), is_active = VALUES(is_active), update_time = sysdate()
